productDisplayName: Nike Men Blue Cricket Tee T-shirt
description: Style Note Gear up this summer for the IPL with your favourite team's T-shirt. Sport this trendy T-shirt from nike and be true to your city! Product Details Deep royal blue T-shirt with a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print with shimmer on chest and back Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron do not iron on decorations
